ddls:
CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the individual */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Place of birth of the individual */,
  "death_date" TEXT /* Date of death of the individual */,
  "death_place" TEXT /* Place of death of the individual */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_death_place FOREIGN KEY ("death_place") REFERENCES locations ("location_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_birth_place FOREIGN KEY ("birth_place") REFERENCES locations ("location_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "county" TEXT /* County where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the location */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual in the relationship */,
  "relative_id" INTEGER /* ID of the relative in the relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., parent, child, spouse) */,
  "relationship_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the relationship */,
  "relationship_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_relative_id FOREIGN KEY ("relative_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mothers" (
  "mother_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mother */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual whose mother this is */,
  "mother_name" TEXT /* Full name of the mother */,
  "maiden_name" TEXT /* Maiden name of the mother */,
  "mother_birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the mother */,
  "mother_death_date" TEXT /* Death date of the mother */,
  "mother_occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the mother */,
  "mother_education" TEXT /* Education level of the mother */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mother_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mothers_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual associated with this record */,
  "record_type" TEXT /* Type of record (e.g., birth, death, marriage) */,
  "record_date" TEXT /* Date of the record */,
  "record_place" TEXT /* Place of the record */,
  "record_file_name" TEXT /* File name of the record */,
  "record_file_path" TEXT /* File path of the record */,
  "record_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_records_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "record_types" (
  "record_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each record type */,
  "record_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the record type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the record type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "boxes" (
  "box_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box */,
  "box_number" TEXT /* Number of the box */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the box is stored */,
  "box_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the box */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_boxes_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "numbers" (
  "number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each number */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record associated with this number */,
  "box_number" TEXT /* Box number where the record is stored */,
  "folder_number" TEXT /* Folder number where the record is stored */,
  "folder_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the folder */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_numbers_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution of the researcher */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researcher_records" (
  "researcher_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher-record association */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_records_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researcher_records_record_id FOREIGN KEY ("record_id") REFERENCES records ("record_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the collaboration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_members" (
  "collaboration_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration member */,
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaboration */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the collaboration */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_members_collaboration_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaboration_id") REFERENCES collaborations ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_members_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
